children.heading: Blue economy
children.label: 1 Blue economy
children.text: The term “blue economy” means the sustainable use of marine, lake, or other aquatic resources in support of economic development objectives.

children.heading: Capacity building
children.label: 2 Capacity building
children.text: The term “capacity building” includes all activities associated with early stage community-based project formation and conceptualization, prior to project predevelopment activity, including grants to local community organizations for planning participation, community outreach and engagement activities, research, and mentorship support to move projects from formation and conceptualization to project predevelopment.

children.heading: Comprehensive economic development strategy
children.label: 3 Comprehensive economic development strategy
children.text: The term “comprehensive economic development strategy” means a comprehensive economic development strategy approved by the Secretary under .section 3162 of this title

children.heading: Department
children.label: 4 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Commerce.

children.label: i
children.text: is composed of areas described in and, to the extent determined appropriate by the Secretary, neighboring counties or communities; andsection 3161(a) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: has been designated by the Secretary as an economic development district under .section 3171 of this title

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: B Inclusion
children.text: The term “economic development district” includes any economic development district designated by the Secretary under (as in effect on the day before the effective date of the Economic Development Administration Reform Act of 1998).section 3173 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: an economic development district;

children.label: ii
children.text: an Indian tribe;

children.label: iii
children.text: a State;

children.label: iv
children.text: a city or other political subdivision of a State, including a special purpose unit of a State or local government engaged in economic or infrastructure development activities, or a consortium of political subdivisions;

children.label: v
children.text: an institution of higher education or a consortium of institutions of higher education;

children.label: vi
children.text: a public or private nonprofit organization or association acting in cooperation with officials of a political subdivision of a State;

children.label: vii
children.text: an economic development organization; or

children.label: viii
children.text: a public-private partnership for public infrastructure.

children.heading: Training, research, and technical assistance grants
children.label: B Training, research, and technical assistance grants
children.text: In the case of grants under , the term “eligible recipient” also includes private individuals and for-profit organizations.section 3147 of this title

children.heading: Federal agency
children.label: 7 Federal agency
children.text: The term “Federal agency” means a department, agency, or instrumentality of the United States.

children.heading: Grant
children.label: 8 Grant
children.text: The term “grant” includes a cooperative agreement (within the meaning of chapter 63 of title 31).

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 9 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” means any Indian tribe, band, nation, pueblo, or other organized group or community, including any Alaska Native village or Regional Corporation (as defined in or established under the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act ( et seq.)), that is recognized as eligible for the special programs and services provided by the United States to Indians because of their status as Indians.43 U.S.C. 1601

children.heading: Outdoor recreation
children.label: 10 Outdoor recreation
children.text: The term “outdoor recreation” means all recreational activities, and the economic drivers of those activities, that occur in nature-based environments outdoors.

children.label: A
children.text: planning and community asset mapping;

children.label: B
children.text: training;

children.label: C
children.text: technical assistance and organizational development;

children.label: D
children.text: feasibility and market studies;

children.label: E
children.text: demonstration projects; and

children.label: F
children.text: other predevelopment activities determined by the Secretary to be appropriate.

children.label: A
children.text: The Appalachian Regional Commission established by .section 14301(a) of title 40

children.label: B
children.text: The Delta Regional Authority established by .section 2009aa–1(a)(1) of title 7

children.label: C
children.text: The Denali Commission established by section 303(a) of the Denali Commission Act of 1998 ( note; ).42 U.S.C. 3121Public Law 105–277

children.label: D
children.text: The Great Lakes Authority established by .section 15301(a)(4) of title 40

children.label: E
children.text: The Mid-Atlantic Regional Commission established by .section 15301(a)(5) of title 40

children.label: F
children.text: The Northern Border Regional Commission established by .section 15301(a)(3) of title 40

children.label: G
children.text: The Northern Great Plains Regional Authority established by .section 2009bb–1(a)(1) of title 7

children.label: H
children.text: The Southeast Crescent Regional Commission established by .section 15301(a)(1) of title 40

children.label: I
children.text: The Southern New England Regional Commission established by .section 15301(a)(6) of title 40

children.label: J
children.text: The Southwest Border Regional Commission established by .section 15301(a)(2) of title 40

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 13 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.

children.heading: State
children.label: 14 State
children.text: The term “State” means a State, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, the Republic of the Marshall Islands, the Federated States of Micronesia, and the Republic of Palau.

children.heading: Travel and tourism
children.label: 15 Travel and tourism
children.text: The term “travel and tourism” means any economic activity that primarily serves to encourage recreational or business travel in or to the United States, including activities relating to public or nonprofit entertainment venues in the United States.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 16 United States
children.text: The term “United States” means all of the States.

children.heading: University center
children.label: 17 University center
children.text: The term “university center” means an institution of higher education or a consortium of institutions of higher education established under .section 3147(c)(1) of this title
